@page-component-object/page.description: Page Component Object (PCO) ŌĆö npm org landing package
@page-component-object/page.summary: npm org landing README for @page-component-object ŌĆö lists all published packages. Install scoped packages like @page-component-object/react instead.

@page-component-object/core.description: PCO core types, App singleton, DataFactory, and runtime injection
@page-component-object/core.summary: Foundation package ŌĆö shared types, `App` singleton, `DataFactory` for fixture data, `PCOContext`/`PCOTarget` adapter contracts, and runtime injection. **Do I need this?** Yes ŌĆö every other `@page-component-object/*` package depends on it.
@page-component-object/core.doINeedThis: Required foundation for all PCO packages.
@page-component-object/core.minimalExample:
import { DataFactory, App } from '@page-component-object/core';
const item = new DataFactory({ id: '1' }).build();

@page-component-object/queries.description: ComponentTestObject ŌĆö resolver-based Testing Library queries and primitive interactions
@page-component-object/queries.summary: `ComponentTestObject` base: `rootResolver`, `this.context` (PCOContext), and `userClick`/`userType` on PCOTarget handles. **Do I need this?** Yes for any DOM test object (Storybook, Cypress, or as base for view TOs).
@page-component-object/queries.doINeedThis: Required for DOM-scoped test objects and presets.

@page-component-object/msw.description: MSW v2 API mock registry, ApiTestObject, and semantic API matchers
@page-component-object/msw.summary: HTTP boundary for view tests ŌĆö `ApiTestObject`, mock sessions, semantic-matchers integration. **Do I need this?** Only for Vitest/Jest/Storybook view tests with mocked APIs.
@page-component-object/msw.doINeedThis: Add when view tests mock HTTP (not needed for DOM-only Storybook plays).

@page-component-object/react.description: BaseViewTestObject and BaseAppManager for React view tests
@page-component-object/react.summary: View-level test objects ŌĆö `setupMockData()`, `render()`, `BaseAppManager`. **Do I need this?** For Vitest/Jest/Storybook MSW-backed behavioral tests.
@page-component-object/react.doINeedThis: Add for routed view tests with `render()` and MSW.

@page-component-object/router-react.description: React Router v6/v7 test shell for PCO view tests
@page-component-object/router-react.summary: MemoryRouter test shell for behavioral navigation tests. **Do I need this?** When views use React Router v6/v7 (not v5).
@page-component-object/router-react.minimalExample: Used via BaseAppManager ŌĆö pass AppRoutes to renderApp(), not production BrowserRouter shell.

@page-component-object/preset-mui.description: Reusable MUI widget test objects for PCO
@page-component-object/preset-mui.summary: MUI widget presets (Select, Dialog, TimePicker, ŌĆ”). **Do I need this?** Optional ŌĆö high value if you use MUI and repeat widget flows.
@page-component-object/preset-mui.doINeedThis: Optional adoption wedge for Material UI teams.

@page-component-object/adapter-vitest.description: Vitest lifecycle and user agent adapter for PCO
@page-component-object/adapter-vitest.summary: Vitest integration ŌĆö `installPCOLifecycle`, semantic API matchers. **Do I need this?** If you run Vitest behavioral view tests.
@page-component-object/adapter-vitest.doINeedThis: Pick one runner adapter matching your test runner.

@page-component-object/adapter-jest.description: Jest lifecycle and user agent adapter for PCO
@page-component-object/adapter-jest.summary: Jest parity with Vitest adapter. **Do I need this?** If you run Jest instead of Vitest.
@page-component-object/adapter-jest.doINeedThis: Pick one runner adapter matching your test runner.

@page-component-object/adapter-storybook.description: Storybook play, MSW bridge, and PCO view loader
@page-component-object/adapter-storybook.summary: Storybook ŌĆö `createStoryPlay`, `storyParameters`, MSW bridge. **Do I need this?** For Storybook `play` functions and shared MSW stories.
@page-component-object/adapter-storybook.minimalExample: play: createStoryPlay(() => new MyTO(), async (_c, view) => { ... })

@page-component-object/adapter-cypress.description: Cypress E2E adapter ŌĆö PCOContext, PCOChainable, unified test objects
@page-component-object/adapter-cypress.summary: Cypress ŌĆö registers `cypressPcoAdapter`, `PCOChainable`, `@testing-library/cypress`. **Do I need this?** For Cypress E2E using shared test object getters.
@page-component-object/adapter-cypress.doINeedThis: Add for Cypress E2E only (not for Vitest/Storybook).

@page-component-object/adapter-playwrigh.description: Playwright adapter research spike ŌĆö Locator-backed PCOTarget
@page-component-object/adapter-playwrigh.summary: Experimental Playwright adapter comparing Locator + await model vs Cypress chains. **Do I need this?** Not for production ŌĆö research only; both E2E paths stay open.
@page-component-object/adapter-playwrigh.doINeedThis: Evaluate only ŌĆö no production requirement.
